{"credits": [{"type": "finder", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/146860500?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexwin/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexwin/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexwin/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexwin/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/kexwin", "id": 146860500, "login": "kexwin", "node_id": "U_kgDOCMDp1A", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexwin/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexwin/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexwin/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexwin/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexwin/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/kexwin", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-48038", "cvss": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 5.3, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:L/PR:N/UI:N/S:U/C:N/I:N/A:L"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-248", "name": "Uncaught Exception"}, {"cwe_id": "CWE-400", "name": "Uncontrolled Resource Consumption"}], "description": "### Impact
Denial of service via untrapped exception in services validating user-supplied JSON / object input with recursive link schemas. 

The blast radius depends on how the application invokes joi:
- Highest impact: `validate()` called without `try/catch` in a request handler would cause an unhandled exception, potentially crashing the process.
- Lower impact: `validateAsync()` or `validate()` inside a `try/catch`, the validation fails, but the error type is `RangeError` rather than a structured `ValidationError`, complicating error handling.

### Patches
Upgrade to version >= 18.2.1.

### Workarounds
Try/catch the validation to avoid uncaught exceptions.

### References
- Pull request: hapijs/joi#3113", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00301, "percentile": 0.22013}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-q7cg-457f-vx79", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-11T13:27:32Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q7cg-457f-vx79", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-q7cg-457f-vx79"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-48038"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-06-11T13:27:32Z", "references": ["https://github.com/hapijs/joi/security/advisories/GHSA-q7cg-457f-vx79", "https://github.com/hapijs/joi/pull/3113", "https://github.com/hapijs/joi/commit/2392713d3e9dd91ba752ac0c96e0eaf3d24b9a11", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-q7cg-457f-vx79"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/hapijs/joi/security-advisories/GHSA-q7cg-457f-vx79", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/hapijs/joi", "summary": "joi has an uncaught RangeError on deeply nested input through recursive `link()` schemas", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-12T19:28:28Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-q7cg-457f-vx79", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "18.2.1", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "joi"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": ">= 18.0.0, < 18.2.1"}, {"first_patched_version": "17.13.4", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "joi"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 17.13.4"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: joi has an uncaught RangeError on deeply nested input through recursive `link()` schemas
